moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Day
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships conclude today with the men's singles and women's doubles finals at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Finals excitement
angles.copy: It all comes down to today! Who will lift the Gentlemen's Singles trophy at Wimbledon 2026? Catch all the action from SW19.

angles.name: Tennis Sunday
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are ready! It's finals day at Wimbledon, marking the end of two incredible weeks of tennis. What's been your highlight?

moments.title: World Cup Knockout Stages
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is in full swing across North America, with the tournament now in its thrilling knockout stages leading up to the final on July 19.

angles.name: Football fever
angles.copy: The World Cup 2026 knockout stages are heating up! Every match is do-or-die. Who are you backing to go all the way?

angles.name: Key matches
angles.copy: Another day, another set of nail-biting World Cup knockout matches. Don't miss a minute of the action as teams battle for a spot in the next round!

moments.title: Llangollen Eisteddfod Closes
moments.blurb: The Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod, a celebration of music and culture, concludes today in North Wales after welcoming competitors from 26 different countries.

angles.name: Eisteddfod farewell
angles.copy: Hwyl fawr Llangollen! The International Musical Eisteddfod wraps up today, after another fantastic week of global music and culture in North Wales. What was your favourite performance?

angles.name: Cultural highlight
angles.copy: From traditional Welsh performances to international acts, the Llangollen Eisteddfod has been a vibrant hub this week. Sad to see it go for another year!

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: The second season of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premieres globally today on Netflix, catching up with the cast post-pods.

angles.name: Reality TV fix
angles.copy: Your Sunday binge is sorted! 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 drops today on Netflix. Ready for all the drama?

angles.name: Post-pod gossip
angles.copy: What happened after the weddings (or non-weddings)? Find out as 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 hits Netflix today. Who are you hoping to see?

moments.title: UK Heatwave & Drought Conditions
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing warm to hot weather, with some areas under heatwave conditions, and temporary use bans (hosepipe bans) are in effect for several water companies in England due to drought.

angles.name: Summer heat
angles.copy: Another warm one across much of the UK today! Remember to stay hydrated and follow any local water restrictions in place. #HeatwaveUK

angles.name: Water restrictions
angles.copy: With hot weather continuing and drought conditions, temporary use bans are in effect for some areas. Check your local water company for details. Every drop counts!

moments.title: Happy 40th to Dan Smith of Bastille
moments.blurb: Dan Smith, lead singer of the hugely popular British band Bastille, turns 40 on July 14, 2026.

angles.name: Bastille frontman
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 40th birthday to Dan Smith, the incredible voice behind Bastille! What's your favourite Bastille track?

angles.name: Celebrating 40
angles.copy: Can you believe Dan Smith from Bastille turns 40 on Tuesday? Time flies when you're making amazing music!

moments.title: Happy 49th to Ray Toro
moments.blurb: Ray Toro, guitarist and co-founder of the iconic alternative band My Chemical Romance, turns 49 on July 15, 2026.

angles.name: MCR guitarist
angles.copy: On Wednesday, we're celebrating the birthday of My Chemical Romance's legendary guitarist, Ray Toro, who turns 49! What's your favourite MCR riff?

angles.name: Guitar hero
angles.copy: Happy almost birthday to Ray Toro of My Chemical Romance, turning 49 on July 15th! Get ready to crank up 'Welcome to the Black Parade'!

moments.title: Happy 35th to Olly Alexander
moments.blurb: Olly Alexander, frontman of Years & Years and recent UK Eurovision representative, turns 35 on July 15, 2026.

angles.name: Years & Years star
angles.copy: Wednesday is a big one! Olly Alexander from Years & Years turns 35. Send him some birthday love!

angles.name: Pop icon
angles.copy: From chart-topping hits with Years & Years to Eurovision, Olly Alexander celebrates his 35th birthday this week. What's your favourite song?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival begins on Wednesday, July 15, running until July 18, bringing a celebration of music and culture to Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland.

angles.name: Island festival
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off this Wednesday! Four days of incredible music and culture await in the stunning Outer Hebrides. Who's heading north?

angles.name: Scottish music
angles.copy: Get ready for the Hebridean Celtic Festival, starting July 15th! A fantastic showcase of talent on the beautiful Isle of Lewis.

moments.title: Big Love Festival in Monmouthshire
moments.blurb: Big Love Festival, a 3-day event featuring music, arts, and wellbeing, takes place in Monmouthshire, Wales, from July 16-19, 2026.

angles.name: Welsh festival fun
angles.copy: Big Love Festival starts Thursday in Monmouthshire! Get ready for a weekend of live music, art, and good vibes in Wales. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Festival anticipation
angles.copy: Counting down to Big Love Festival in Wales, starting July 16th! Three days of incredible acts and experiences in the beautiful Monmouthshire countryside.

moments.title: Happy 74th to Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the legendary drummer of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on July 16, 2026.

angles.name: Drumming legend
angles.copy: The Police's iconic drummer, Stewart Copeland, turns 74 this Thursday! What's your favourite Police song to drum along to?

angles.name: Rock icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Stewart Copeland on July 16th! The man behind the beat for The Police. Send him some love!

moments.title: Happy 30th to Luke Hemmings
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, frontman of Australian pop-rock band 5 Seconds of Summer, celebrates his 30th birthday on July 16, 2026.

angles.name: 5SOS star turns 30
angles.copy: Huge happy 30th birthday to Luke Hemmings from 5 Seconds of Summer this Thursday! How are you celebrating?

angles.name: Pop-rock celebrations
angles.copy: Can you believe Luke Hemmings hits the big 3-0 on July 16th? Get ready to blast some 5SOS tunes!

moments.title: Official Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The UK's Official Singles Chart Top 40 will be updated this Friday, July 17th, revealing the nation's biggest hits.

angles.name: Chart race
angles.copy: Who will be number one this week? The Official Singles Chart Top 40 gets updated this Friday! Any predictions?

angles.name: New music Friday
angles.copy: It's almost Friday, which means new music and a fresh look at the UK Singles Chart! What songs are you hoping make it big?

moments.title: Happy 77th to Geezer Butler
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the iconic bassist and lyricist for heavy metal pioneers Black Sabbath, turns 77 on July 17, 2026.

angles.name: Metal legend
angles.copy: Raise your horns! Black Sabbath's legendary bassist, Geezer Butler, turns 77 this Friday. What's your favourite Sabbath track?

angles.name: Sabbath icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy birthday to Geezer Butler on July 17th! The man behind some of metal's most enduring lyrics. #BlackSabbath

moments.title: Happy 44th to Natasha Hamilton
moments.blurb: Natasha Hamilton, singer-songwriter and member of the successful British girl group Atomic Kitten, turns 44 on July 17, 2026.

angles.name: Atomic Kitten star
angles.copy: Friday means birthday wishes for Natasha Hamilton of Atomic Kitten, turning 44! What's your favourite Atomic Kitten hit?

angles.name: Pop princess
angles.copy: Celebrating Natasha Hamilton's 44th birthday on July 17th! Get ready to sing along to some classic Atomic Kitten tunes.

moments.title: Happy 40th to Tom Fletcher
moments.blurb: Tom Fletcher, singer, songwriter, and guitarist for the popular British band McFly, turns 40 on July 17, 2026.

angles.name: McFly frontman
angles.copy: It's Tom Fletcher's 40th birthday this Friday! The McFly star hits the big 4-0. What's your favourite McFly song?

angles.name: Birthday Boy
angles.copy: Happy 40th birthday wishes heading to Tom Fletcher on July 17th! Get ready to celebrate with some McFly classics.

moments.title: Splendour Festival Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, Splendour, takes place at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park from July 18-19, 2026, featuring five stages of music across all genres.

angles.name: Nottingham festival
angles.copy: Splendour Festival kicks off this Saturday in Nottingham! Two days of fantastic music across five stages. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Weekend plans
angles.copy: If you're in Nottingham, your weekend is sorted! Splendour Festival starts July 18th at Wollaton Hall. Get ready for an amazing line-up!
